case_title: DURDICA GLUMAC VS. ADRIAN GEORGE TEDESCHI

docket_entries.description: AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 **CORRECTION OF SPELLING OF DEFENDANT'S NAME** FILED BY GLUMAC, DURDICA AS TO DEFENDANT TEDESCHI, ADRIAN GEORGE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2022 - JUDGMENT. PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 7-22-22.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GLUMAC, DURDICA AS TO DEFENDANT TEDESCHI, ADRIAN GEORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-22-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-22-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF DURDICA GLUMAC IS PRESENT. COURT ALLOWS SUSANNA PANARI, TRUSTEE TO SPEAK ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. DEFENDANT ADRIAN GEORGE TEDESCHI IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE. THE REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS DENIED BECAUSE: THE REQUEST DID NOT INCLUDE A GOOD REASON FOR THE POSTPONEMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GLUMAC, DURDICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TEDESCHI, ADRIAN GEORGE $5,997.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,112.00, SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
